hypothesis: v3: Low-severity Code Quality issues (missing docstrings, file headers, style nits) produce shallow 2-3 sentence outputs with no code examples — zero training value. Add hard rule: EVERY output must include at least one before/after code snippet. If the issue is too trivial to show meaningful before/after code, SKIP the entry.
evidence: winstonjs-winston.jsonl: LOW Code Quality entries produce outputs like 'Fix: Add a proper file header describing the purpose...' with no code. Contrast with go-kit-kit.jsonl HIGH/MEDIUM entries with full code blocks, CVSS scores, and step-by-step fixes. Recent runs (nemotron model) show strong quality for MEDIUM+ but still shallow for LOW code quality.
note: v2 DATA QUALITY GATE was created but not deployed to cron last cycle — cron still ran v1. Deploying v3 this cycle which subsumes v2's gate.
